layout.grid_system: Bento 'Tetris' Grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8) for features and services. Do not perfectly fill 100% of the grid.
layout.border_radius: Sharp edges (rounded-none or rounded-sm) for a technical, precise architectural feel.

components_strategy.header: Sticky with Glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 border-b border-black/5).
components_strategy.hero: Asymmetrical layout. Heavy typography overlaid on architectural glass imagery with bg-white/30 gradient overlay.
components_strategy.cards: Flat solid surfaces. 1px solid border (border-black/10). No soft shadows, use sharp drop-shadows on hover.
components_strategy.buttons: Square edges, high contrast. Primary uses #002FA7. Include clear data-testid attributes.
components_strategy.icons: @phosphor-icons/react (Duotone or Regular weight for technical precision).

hero_background.description: Tall modern glass building with trees. Use in hero section.

service_antisolari.description: Modern building facade reflecting sunset colors. Use for Solar/Heat Control Window Films.

service_privacy.description: Contemporary office space with glass doors. Use for Privacy/Design Films.

service_sicurezza.description: Shatterproof security glass demo. Use for Security Films.

service_lcd_switch.description: Smart glass privacy partition. Use for LCD Switch Films.

installation_process.description: Professional installer fitting a window. Use for About Us / Process section.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. FRAMEWORK: Use pure HTML/Tailwind for structural marketing layouts. Use Shadcn strictly for complex interactive components (forms, dialogs) but heavily override their styles to match the 'Swiss High-Contrast' theme (sharp edges, high contrast).
2. TYPOGRAPHY: Import and use Cabinet Grotesk for headings. Headings must be tight (tracking-tight or tracking-tighter) and never centered by default (asymmetry preferred).

3. HERO SECTION: Implement multiple CTAs (Quote, Call, WhatsApp) distinctly. Use pure #002FA7 for the primary action (Quote) and white/outline for others. Max hero image overlay opacity is bg-white/40 (gradient preferred).
4. SERVICES GRID: Use Mode A: 'The Tetris Grid' (col-span-full, col-span-4, row-span-2). Make it look like an architectural bento box. Do not use basic 3-column equal grids.
5. TRUST BAR: Implement a slow 'Editorial Ribbon' marquee using react-fast-marquee for partners (MADICO, ISO 9001) and stats (30+ Anni, 150k mq/anno).
6. ANIMATION: Install and configure `lenis` for smooth scrolling. Add staggered entrance animations (framer-motion) for bento grid cards.
7. TESTING: ALL interactive elements (buttons, forms, links) MUST have a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., data-testid='cta-preventivo-hero').
8. THEME: No generic blue gradients. Stick to solid, high-contrast colors (White, #0A0A0A, #002FA7). Use 1px borders to define structure.
